overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic motorcycles, and crowds of pedestrians. The video showcases high-quality game engine graphics with reflective wet surfaces and dense urban architecture reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow wet alley at night, focusing on two futuristic motorcycles parked against the wall. The camera moves slowly past the vehicles, examining their custom details, before approaching the alley exit where neon lights from the main street become visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a wide neon-lit street with wet reflective pavement. The camera walks past groups of pedestrians near a fire hydrant while towering glass buildings covered in digital billboards rise ahead. The BEEP neon sign glows prominently on the right as the camera moves through the moderate crowd.

segments.scene_description: Walking down the main street, the camera passes a large pedestrian wearing sunglasses at close range. The elevated highway structure becomes visible on the left while a concrete ramp structure appears on the right. The crowd thins out as the camera approaches the intersection ahead, with the BEEP sign now visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with concrete ramps and parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide urban intersection where the concrete ramp structure dominates the right side at close range. Parked futuristic vehicles line the left side of the street near the crosswalk lines. The camera continues walking toward the intersection traffic lights, with tall neon towers visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a dark alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding past two detailed futuristic motorcycles parked against a wet wall, moving slowly toward the alley exit where the glow of the main street first appears. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide thoroughfare of reflective pavement and towering digital billboards, passing through a moderate crowd of pedestrians beneath a prominent BEEP neon sign. The perspective then shifts toward an elevated highway and concrete ramps as the crowd thins, moving past a close-range figure in sunglasses toward a wide urban intersection. Finally, the camera approaches the intersection traffic lights, passing parked futuristic vehicles on the left while the view expands to reveal distant, glowing neon towers.
